metadata.name: Handle Breaking News During a Broadcast

description: During a pre-game show, major breaking news happens (e.g., a star player is unexpectedly traded). The producer must immediately incorporate it into the show.

nodes.task_description: Receive the breaking news alert from a credible source.

expected_outcome.expected: The producer gets confirmation of the trade.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the on-air talent to announce the breaking news.

expected_outcome.expected: The hosts announce the trade on air.

nodes.task_description: Direct the graphics operator to create a 'Breaking News' graphic with the trade details.

expected_outcome.expected: A graphic with the news is quickly created and displayed on screen.
